Acknowledgements

Source: vignettes/Acknowledgements.Rmd
Acknowledgements.Rmd
library(analysiskmeans)

Acknowledgments

I want to acknowledge the sources I used during the creation of this package and corresponding documentation!

  1. I would like to acknowledge the following resourceful documentation created by Dr. Jared Andrews for the creation of most of this package. I would recommend this guide to anyone who is looking to create an R package for the first time, as it is a very detailed, comprehensive overview of what goes into one.

  2. I would like to acknowledge my classmates for assisting me with this project when I got stuck, or had bugs in my code! Particularly, I’d like to acknowledge Liane Muir for helping me when I got stuck!

  3. Lastly, I would like to acknowledge the use of GPT and Claude AI to debug my code and give suggestions if I ran into problems during the creation of my package.

  4. I attempted to create cool ASCII Art Text for my package header. It did not go the way I planned, but in the actual R file, it looks perfect! This was used from the following source!

Developed by Naamna Modi.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
